translations.text: and you who have gone astray and denied the truth
will eat from the bitter tree of Zaqqum,
filling your bellies with it,
and drink scalding water,
lapping it like thirsty camels.’
This will be their welcome on the Day of Judgement.
It was We who created you: will you not believe?
Consider [the semen] you eject-
do you create it yourselves or are We the Creator?

text_qpc_hafs: نَحۡنُ قَدَّرۡنَا بَيۡنَكُمُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ ٦٠
text_uthmani: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ

translations.text: We ordained death to be among you. Nothing could stop Us

text_qpc_hafs: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمۡثَٰلَكُمۡ وَنُنشِئَكُمۡ فِي مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ ٦١
text_uthmani: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

translations.text: if We intended to change you and recreate you in a way unknown to you.

text_qpc_hafs: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ ٦٢
text_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

translations.text: You have learned how you were first created: will you not reflect?
Consider the seeds you sow in the ground-
is it you who make them grow or We?

text_qpc_hafs: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ حُطَٰمٗا فَظَلۡتُمۡ تَفَكَّهُونَ ٦٥
text_uthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ

translations.text: If We wished, We could turn your harvest into chaff and leave you to wail,
‘We are burdened with debt;
we are bereft.’
Consider the water you drink-

text_qpc_hafs: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنزَلۡتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُزۡنِ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنزِلُونَ ٦٩
text_uthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ

translations.text: was it you who brought it down from the rain-cloud or We?

text_qpc_hafs: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ جَعَلۡنَٰهُ أُجَاجٗا فَلَوۡلَا تَشۡكُرُونَ ٧٠
text_uthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ

translation.text: then why are you not grateful
then why are you not grateful

translations.text: If We wanted, We could make it bitter: will you not be thankful?
Consider the fire you kindle-

text_qpc_hafs: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنشَأۡتُمۡ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنشِـُٔونَ ٧٢
text_uthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ

translations.text: is it you who make the wood for it grow or We?

translation.text: for the wayfarers in the desert

translations.text: We made it a reminder, and useful to those who kindle it,
so [Prophet] glorify the name of your Lord, the Supreme.
I swear by the positions of the stars-
a mighty oath, if you only knew-
